user.title: Connect to AAT Multiroom
user.description: Enter the IP address of your AAT amplifier. The default TCP port is 5000.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure connection
reconfigure.description: Change the IP, TCP port, or number of zones. Useful for moving HA to the AAT's secondary TCP port (default 1024) so the AAT mobile app can keep using port 5000.

naming.title: Name your zones and inputs
naming.description: Give each zone and input a friendly name. Leave an input blank to hide it. These names are what you'll use with Alexa ("turn off the kitchen" or "play living room on Spotify").

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the AAT at that address. Check the IP, the TCP port, and that the AAT is powered on.

init.title: Edit names
init.description: Update the friendly names for zones and inputs. Leave an input blank to hide it.
